content:
As a Chartered Marine Scientist with an interest in geospatial data science, I am involved in projects that focus on aquatic habitat conservation and restoration, climate resilience and education across the Thames Estuary.
I also lead natural history and ecology-focused stand up paddleboarding (SUP) sessions on the upper reaches of the Thames Estuary.
summary: As a Chartered Marine Scientist with an interest in geospatial data science, I am involved in projects that focus on aquatic habitat conservation and restoration, climate resilience and education across the Thames Estuary.
title: Wanda Bodnar
